label: Auroraweld Atelier
description: Auroraweld Atelier is a compact manufactorum workshop set into the bastion’s vitrified stone superstructure, its walls jacketed with grounded mesh and lightning-scarred conduit runs. Workbenches of slagcrete and ironwood stand beneath hooded lumen arrays, while crane rails and chainfalls traverse the ceiling for handling armored plates and wreck-metal stock. Vent stacks and particulate baffles keep ashfall from fouling tools, and the air carries the permanent tang of machine oils and hot flux. Sealed vox-cabinets and overbuilt data jacks line one wall, engineered to endure the city’s constant interference and auroral backwash.
